calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-19-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: CBA Collection Bureau of America, Ltd.
No appearance by the Defendant: Mike Melkonian dba Sunset Tree Service.
10:00 a.m. - Plaintiff's witness: Gwen S. Lindsey, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Final Bill mailed 5-14-04-------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for the sum of $802.94 in principal, costs per cost bill.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit in open court.
Counsel to prepare Judgment to Dept. 218 with in one week.

Aug. 9, 2004
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2004 Set For Trial On Jul-19-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
